case_title: BECKETT ROBERT E. VS NABISCO FOOD-OLANTERS LIFESAVERS COMPANY

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NABISCO FOOD-OLANTERS LIFESAVERS COMPANY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECKETT ROBERT E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NABISCO FOOD-OLANTERS LIFESAVERS COMPANY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.61 FILED BY BECKETT ROBERT E. AS TO DEFENDANT NABISCO FOOD-OLANTERS LIFESAVERS COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PRENTICE HALL CORP. RETURNED SIGNED.
